page: Microsoft Azure M128-64bs_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MBSMediumMemoryv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8473C processor with an x86_64 architecture, operating at a clock speed of 4.0 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 32 physical cores with 2.0 threads per core, a 105 MB L3 cache, and 1024.0 GB of system memory, yielding 16.0 GB of RAM per core. This server does not include local storage or integrated GPUs.

Benchmark data indicates top-tier performance in memory bandwidth, with large-block read speeds reaching 365.6 GB/sec and write speeds at 173.16 GB/sec. The processor demonstrates strong multi-core capabilities, scoring 20545.0 in Geekbench multi-core and 81783.6 in Passmark CPU tests. It also excels in specialized operations, achieving top-tier results in Passmark database operations and static web serving throughput. Advanced instruction support, including AVX-512 and Intel AMX, accelerates workloads like LLM inference, where it processes 238.13 tokens/sec for medium 7B models.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the high memory-to-vCPU ratio makes this instance highly resource-dense for memory-bound workloads, reducing the need to scale out to larger, more expensive node counts. However, the complete absence of local storage means all storage operations must rely on external block storage, which may introduce latency and additional network storage costs.

This server configuration is designed for memory-intensive and database-heavy workloads. It is highly suitable for large-scale relational databases, in-memory caching layers like Redis, enterprise resource planning systems, and memory-bound data processing pipelines.

Benchmarks show top-tier performance in memory bandwidth, with read speeds of 365.6 GB/sec and write speeds of 173.16 GB/sec, alongside strong database operations and static web serving throughput. This configuration is highly efficient for memory-intensive applications, large databases, and in-memory caching, though users must account for the lack of local storage.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M128-64bs_v3 is a memory-optimized server featuring 64 vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and an Intel Xeon 8473C processor. It delivers top-tier memory bandwidth and database performance without local storage.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M128-64bs_v3 is a memory-optimized server with 64 vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and an Intel Xeon CPU, designed for large database workloads.
tagline: A high-frequency, memory-dense virtual machine featuring one terabyte of RAM and advanced matrix extensions for demanding database and memory-bound workloads.

1024.0 GB of system memory providing 16.0 GB of RAM per core
